column1: Juan Soto stands out as the top pick with a strong track record of hits in 80% of games and a favorable platoon advantage against Michael Lorenzen. Bo Bichette also offers reliability atop the order and benefits from a solid park boost, making him a steady secondary option. Xavier Edwards and Nico Hoerner bring consistency and both enjoy the platoon edge, but Soto’s combination of matchup and recent form gives him the clear edge for Beat The Streak selections.
